index.hero.title: Your Next Patient Intake Runs Itself.
index.hero.subtitle: SoloVetAI handles client intake by chat, phone, or website widget — captures every detail about the animal's symptoms and history, and delivers a structured visit summary with AI context notes — so your team is prepared before the first appointment.
index.hero.launchNotice: Be the first to know when we launch
index.pain.title: Sound familiar?
index.pain.subtitle: Solo veterinarians lose time and pet owners to the same three problems every day.
index.pain.phone.title: Phone rings non-stop
index.pain.phone.body: A worried pet owner calls while you're in an exam room. They leave a voicemail. You call back between appointments. They don't answer. By the time you connect, they've taken their pet somewhere else.
index.pain.zero.title: Every visit starts from zero
index.pain.zero.body: You spend the first 10 minutes of every new patient visit learning basics — pet name, breed, symptoms, history — that you could have captured before they walked in.
index.pain.afterHours.title: After-hours emergencies go dark
index.pain.afterHours.body: A pet owner's dog starts limping at 10pm on a Saturday. They search for vets, find your website, and have no way to tell you what's wrong. They call the 24-hour emergency clinic instead.
index.features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
index.features.subtitle: Six powerful capabilities that transform how solo veterinarians manage new patients.
index.features.aiIntake.title: AI Client Intake
index.features.aiIntake.body: A branded AI assistant collects every detail you need — via chat, form, or website widget, in English or Spanish — while you focus on your patients.
index.features.phoneIntake.title: AI Phone Intake
index.features.phoneIntake.body: A dedicated phone number where pet owners speak naturally with your AI assistant. Every call becomes a structured summary — 24/7, no hold music.
index.features.visitSummary.title: Visit Summary & AI Notes
index.features.visitSummary.body: Every intake lands in your inbox as a structured summary with AI-generated context: symptom analysis, breed-specific flags, and suggested follow-up questions.
index.features.docIntel.title: Document Intelligence
index.features.docIntel.body: Request records from pet owners, receive secure uploads, and get AI-powered summaries with vaccination history, prior diagnoses, and treatment-relevant highlights.
index.features.aiBrief.title: AI Intelligence Brief
index.features.aiBrief.body: Every intake generates a deep-dive analysis — breed-specific health flags, symptom pattern recognition, urgency assessment, and suggested diagnostics.

index.howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes

index.howItWorks.step1.title: Set up your profile
index.howItWorks.step1.description: Upload your logo, set your assistant's name, add your specialties and intake questions, and get your unique client intake link — in under 10 minutes.
index.howItWorks.step2.title: Share your intake link
index.howItWorks.step2.description: Add it to your website, email signature, social profiles, or anywhere you connect with pet owners. Your AI handles every conversation — 24/7.
index.howItWorks.step3.title: Review and respond
index.howItWorks.step3.description: Get a structured summary with AI context notes the moment a pet owner submits. Know the symptoms, the history, and the right questions before you ever walk into the exam room.

index.dualBenefit.step1.vet.body: Intake runs 24/7 — nights, weekends, holidays. Every pet owner is captured the moment they reach out.
index.dualBenefit.step1.owner.title: Get help the moment your pet needs it
index.dualBenefit.step1.owner.body: No voicemail, no waiting until Monday. Reach out at 2am when your pet is in distress and get an immediate, caring response.

index.dualBenefit.step2.vet.title: Every detail captured automatically
index.dualBenefit.step2.vet.body: Structured intake with pet history, symptoms, and timeline — no scribbled notes, no missed details, no 10-minute fact-finding at check-in.

index.dualBenefit.step2.owner.body: No intimidating forms. A warm, empathetic conversation that feels like talking to a real person — so you can explain exactly what's going on.

index.dualBenefit.step3.vet.body: AI-generated visit brief with symptom analysis, breed-specific flags, and suggested diagnostics — before the pet even arrives.
index.dualBenefit.step3.owner.title: Your vet already understands your pet's situation

index.dualBenefit.step4.vet.title: More time for what matters
index.dualBenefit.step4.vet.body: Spend your time on diagnosis and treatment — not copying intake notes from voicemail or chasing down basic pet history.

index.dualBenefit.step4.owner.body: From "my pet needs a vet" to a prepared appointment — faster than you thought possible. The care of a specialist with the personal touch of a neighborhood practice.

features.hero.title: Built for the Solo Veterinarian
features.hero.subtitle: Intake by chat, phone, or widget. AI document analysis. Marketing tools. Everything you need — without adding overhead or hiring staff.
features.intake.title: Intake That Runs Itself
features.intake.description: Pet owners get a conversational AI intake or a structured form — in English or Spanish. You get the details you need. No phone tag, no back-and-forth, no scheduling required on your end.

features.intake.f5: Your disclaimer presented to every pet owner before they begin
features.intake.f6: Your logo, practice name, and greeting — pet owners never see SoloVetAI
features.visitSummary.title: Know the Visit Before the Appointment
features.visitSummary.description: Every submission arrives with a structured pet owner summary and AI-generated context notes — flagging breed-specific risks, symptom patterns, vaccination gaps, and suggested follow-up questions — so you're prepared the moment the pet walks in.

features.visitSummary.f2: AI contextual notes — breed-specific flags, symptom analysis, and diagnostic suggestions — for your eyes only
features.visitSummary.f3: Suggested follow-up questions tailored to the concern
features.visitSummary.f4: Delivered to your inbox the moment intake is submitted
features.visitSummary.f5: Pet owner receives a clean, branded confirmation with their submission summary
features.phoneIntake.title: AI Phone Intake — 24/7
features.phoneIntake.description: Give your practice a dedicated phone number where callers speak naturally with your AI assistant. No hold music, no phone trees — just a professional conversation that captures every detail and delivers the same structured summary as chat intake.

features.phoneIntake.f2: Callers speak naturally — your AI assistant guides the conversation

features.docIntel.title: Documents In, Insights Out
features.docIntel.description: Request documents from pet owners with one click. AI recommends what to ask for based on the visit type, pet owners upload securely, and every document is automatically analyzed — key dates, findings, red flags, and a visit-relevant summary — ready for your review.

features.docIntel.f2: Pet owners upload securely via a branded, encrypted portal

features.docIntel.f4: Handles PDFs, images, scanned documents, and Word files
features.docIntel.f5: 30-day secure retention — pass-through, not a vault
features.docIntel.f6: No human ever views pet owner documents — fully automated
features.aiBrief.title: AI Intelligence Brief
features.aiBrief.description: Every intake automatically generates a deep-dive analysis that goes beyond summarizing what the pet owner said. The Intelligence Brief identifies breed-specific predispositions, symptom pattern analysis, potential diagnostic considerations, and suggests the follow-up questions that matter most — so you walk into every appointment with the insight of a veterinary specialist.
features.aiBrief.f1: Breed-specific risk flagging — alerts when symptoms align with known breed predispositions
features.aiBrief.f2: Symptom pattern analysis with differential diagnosis suggestions
features.aiBrief.f3: Vaccination and preventive care gap flags with recommended actions
features.aiBrief.f4: Suggested follow-up questions tailored to the specific pet concern
features.aiBrief.f5: Delivered alongside the intake summary — no extra step required
features.brand.title: Your Brand, Your Link
features.brand.description: Pet owners never see "SoloVetAI." They see your practice name, your logo, and your intake page — at a URL you control. Every detail is configurable from your admin portal, and when they're ready to visit, send a one-click appointment invite.

features.brand.f3: Set your assistant's name, pet owner greeting, and specialty focus
features.brand.f4: Configure disclaimers in English and Spanish

features.brand.f6: Send appointment invites via Calendly or any scheduling link
features.marketing.title: Look Professional Online, Instantly
features.marketing.description: The Marketing Kit generates platform-ready social media posts and professionally branded visual cards in seconds — tailored to your practice, your specialties, and your intake link. No designer. No copywriter. No extra tools.

features.marketing.f2: Branded visual cards pre-sized for every platform — download as PNG, ready to upload
features.marketing.f3: Edit the card headline (AI-suggested, fully customizable) to match your voice
features.marketing.f4: 5 color themes — or use your brand color pulled automatically from your logo
features.marketing.f5: Website banner sizes included for your practice's website
features.marketing.f6: Generate in English or Spanish — bilingual from the start
features.integrations.title: Connect to the Tools You Already Use
features.integrations.description: Every completed intake can automatically flow to your CRM, your spreadsheets, your project management tools — wherever you need it. No copy-pasting, no manual data entry, no switching between tabs.

features.integrations.webhooks: Custom webhooks — send intake data to any endpoint with HMAC-signed payloads for security
features.integrations.calendly: Calendly — send one-click consultation invites with personalized booking links
features.integrations.noDevRequired: Connect and disconnect in seconds — no developer required

features.blog.description: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts tailored to your practice, your specialties, and your location — in seconds. Each post comes with a title, article, meta description, keywords, and a ready-to-post social media teaser. Content marketing without the content struggle.

benefits.cta.title: The Real Difference
benefits.cta.body: Solo veterinarians don't have vet techs handling phones, intake coordinators, or 24/7 answering services. Your pet owners don't know that — and with SoloVetAI, they'll never need to. Every interaction feels like a large clinic with the personal attention only a solo practitioner can provide.

pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq.q1.question: What's included in the free trial?
pricing.faq.q1.answer: Your 14-day free trial gives you full access to everything — including the Marketing Kit — on both plans. A credit card is required at signup, but you won't be charged until day 15. Cancel anytime before then and you'll never be billed.
pricing.faq.q2.question: What counts as an intake?
pricing.faq.q2.answer: Each completed client intake submission counts as one intake — whether through the AI chat, structured form, or phone call. Incomplete sessions (pet owners who start but don't finish) do not count against your monthly limit. Limits reset on the first of each month.
pricing.faq.q3.question: How does the AI phone intake line work?
pricing.faq.q3.answer: Pro+ includes a dedicated local phone number for your practice. When a pet owner calls, they speak naturally with your AI intake assistant — no hold music, no phone trees. The assistant asks the same intake questions as the chat experience, and every call is processed identically: you receive a structured summary, AI context notes, and email notifications just like any other intake. The line is available 24/7 so you never miss a new patient.
pricing.faq.q4.question: What is Document Intelligence?
pricing.faq.q4.answer: Pro+ includes Document Intelligence — a secure workflow for requesting and receiving veterinary records. After an intake, you can request specific documents (AI recommends what to ask for based on the pet's condition). The pet owner receives a branded email with a secure upload link. Once uploaded, AI automatically analyzes each document — extracting vaccination history, prior diagnoses, and visit-relevant highlights — so you have an organized brief before the appointment. Documents are encrypted, never viewed by any human, and automatically deleted after 30 days.
pricing.faq.q5.question: What is the Marketing Kit?
pricing.faq.q5.answer: The Marketing Kit is a Pro-exclusive tool that generates ready-to-post social media content for your practice. In seconds, it creates platform-tailored post copy for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor — plus professionally branded visual cards sized for each platform and website banner formats. Everything is pre-filled with your practice name, specialties, and intake link. Edit the copy before you post, then download your preferred image and share.
pricing.faq.q6.question: Can I switch plans?
pricing.faq.q6.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any time — your billing is prorated for the remainder of the month. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing period.
pricing.faq.q7.question: Is this only for solo veterinarians?
pricing.faq.q7.answer: SoloVetAI is designed for solo practitioners and small practices. Each account is tied to one veterinarian, one branded intake link, and one inbox. If you're part of a multi-vet practice, each veterinarian can set up their own account with their own branded intake experience.
pricing.faq.q8.question: Can I cancel anytime?
pricing.faq.q8.answer: Yes. Cancel anytime from your account settings. You'll retain access through the end of your current billing period. No cancellation fees, no questions asked.
pricing.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
pricing.cta.subtitle: SoloVetAI is coming Q2 2026. Join the waitlist to be first in line.
faq.hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SoloVetAI — how it works, what's included, and how to get the most out of it.
faq.how1.question: How does the AI client intake work?
faq.how1.answer: When a pet owner visits your unique intake link, they are guided through a secure, conversational intake experience powered by an AI assistant. The AI asks questions relevant to your specialties — covering the pet's symptoms, history, timeline, and any veterinarian-specific custom questions you've configured. Pet owners can respond naturally in their own words, and the system structures their answers into a clean summary delivered straight to your inbox. Pet owners can also complete a traditional structured form if they prefer. Both paths feed into the same intake pipeline.
faq.how2.question: What happens after a pet owner submits an intake?
faq.how2.answer: The moment a pet owner submits, two things happen automatically. First, you receive a detailed email notification with the pet owner's full contact information, pet details, symptom summary, and answers to any custom questions you've added. That email also includes AI-generated contextual notes — a private section, visible only to you, that flags potential health concerns, breed-specific considerations, and suggested follow-up questions. Second, the pet owner receives a professional confirmation email summarizing what they submitted, so they know their information was received. All submissions are also stored in your admin portal for easy review and management.
faq.how3.question: Does the AI assistant give veterinary advice?
faq.how3.answer: No. The AI assistant is strictly an intake tool — it collects information from pet owners on your behalf. It does not provide veterinary advice, diagnoses, or any guidance on how a pet owner should proceed with their animal's care. The AI is transparent with pet owners about this role. Any AI-generated notes in the veterinarian email are internal analytical aids for your eyes only and are clearly labeled "not veterinary advice." All medical judgment, diagnosis, and treatment recommendations remain entirely with you as the licensed veterinarian.
faq.how4.question: How does client authentication work?
faq.how4.answer: Pet owners access your intake link and are prompted to verify their identity using a secure one-time passcode (OTP) sent to their email address — similar to two-factor authentication. There is no password to create or remember. Once verified, new pet owners are asked to provide their name, and then proceed directly into the intake. Returning pet owners who have previously verified are recognized automatically and skip the name step. This approach ensures intake submissions are tied to a verified email address and protects against spam or anonymous misuse.
faq.how5.question: Does SoloVetAI support languages other than English?
faq.how5.answer: Yes. SoloVetAI has full bilingual support for English and Spanish. When a pet owner visits your intake link, they can select their preferred language before beginning. The entire intake experience — the AI assistant's questions and responses, the structured form fields, and the confirmation email sent to the pet owner — is delivered in their chosen language. Veterinarian notification emails are always sent in English, regardless of the pet owner's language preference.
faq.how6.question: How do I share my intake link with pet owners?
faq.how6.answer: Every veterinarian account comes with a unique vanity URL in the format solovetai.com/assistant/yourpracticename. You can share this link anywhere — add it to your website, include it in your email signature, post it on social media, or send it directly to pet owners. The link opens a fully branded intake experience with your logo, practice name, and custom greeting. There is no technical setup required on your website — the link works immediately from any device or browser.
faq.how7.question: What specialties does SoloVetAI support?
faq.how7.answer: SoloVetAI supports all veterinary specialties. When setting up your profile, you select from a broad list that includes small animal, large animal, equine, exotic, emergency/critical care, dermatology, surgery, dentistry, ophthalmology, and more. You can also add a custom specialty if yours isn't listed. The AI assistant uses your selected specialties to tailor the conversation and ask contextually relevant follow-up questions about the animal's condition.
faq.setup1.question: How long does setup take?
faq.setup1.answer: Most veterinarians are fully set up and sharing their intake link within 10 minutes. The setup process involves entering your practice name and your name, uploading your logo (optional), selecting your specialties, writing a custom greeting for pet owners, adding any custom intake questions, and optionally connecting a scheduling link. Once saved, your branded intake experience is live immediately — no development work, no waiting for approvals.
faq.setup2.question: Can I customize the intake questions?
faq.setup2.answer: Yes, fully. In addition to the core intake fields collected from every pet owner (name, contact info, pet concern, timeline, and contact preference), you can add unlimited custom questions tailored to your practice. Custom questions appear both in the AI chat flow and the structured form. You can also add a custom disclaimer — in English and Spanish separately — that appears at the bottom of the pet owner's confirmation email. Your branding (logo, practice name, greeting message) is fully customizable from your profile settings.
faq.setup3.question: Can I connect my scheduling or Calendly link?
faq.setup3.answer: Yes. You can connect your Calendly account directly through your admin portal, or simply paste in any scheduling link (Acuity, Google Booking, a direct Calendly link, or any URL). Once connected, pet owners who complete an intake can automatically receive an appointment invite email with your scheduling link, allowing them to book time with you immediately after submitting. This removes the back-and-forth of manually following up with every new patient.
faq.billing1.question: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.billing1.answer: Yes. Every new account starts with a 14-day free trial that includes full access to all features on both plans — including the Marketing Kit. A credit card is required to start, but you will not be charged until your trial ends. You can customize your profile, share your intake link with real pet owners, receive intake submissions, and generate marketing content during the trial period.
faq.billing2.question: What is the difference between the Starter and Pro plans?
faq.billing2.answer: Both plans include the full intake system — AI chat intake, structured form, bilingual support, branded intake link, vet and pet owner email notifications, AI context notes, custom questions, scheduling integration, and access to your admin portal. Starter ($49/month) — Up to 50 completed intakes per month. Ideal for veterinarians with a steady but moderate volume of new patients. Pro ($79/month) — Up to 150 intakes per month, plus full access to the Marketing Kit for generating social media posts and branded visual cards.
faq.billing3.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.billing3.answer: Yes. Cancel anytime from your account settings. You'll retain access through the end of your current billing period. No cancellation fees, no questions asked.
faq.sec1.question: Is my client data secure?
faq.sec1.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit using TLS and encrypted at rest using AES-256 through our database infrastructure. Client intake data is scoped strictly to your veterinarian account — no data is shared across accounts, and no information is used to train AI models. Authentication uses one-time passcodes rather than passwords, reducing credential exposure.
faq.sec2.question: Who can see my clients' intake submissions?
faq.sec2.answer: Only you. Intake submissions are accessible solely through your authenticated admin portal. Pet owners can see a summary of their own submission in their confirmation email, but they cannot access any other data. The AI-generated contextual notes in your email are for your eyes only and are never shared with the pet owner. SoloVetAI staff do not access individual submissions except when required for support purposes you specifically request.
faq.support1.question: Is SoloVetAI only for solo veterinarians?
faq.support1.answer: SoloVetAI is purpose-built for solo practitioners and small practices. Each account is tied to one veterinarian, one branded intake link, and one notification inbox. If you are part of a multi-vet practice, each veterinarian can set up their own individual account with their own branded intake experience, vanity URL, and custom questions.
faq.support2.question: What if I need help with setup or have questions?
faq.support2.answer: We're here to help. You can reach us directly at sean@solosolutionsai.com for any setup questions, technical issues, or feedback. We aim to respond to all support inquiries within one business day. You can also use the contact form on our website.
faq.cta.title: Still Have Questions?
faq.cta.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out or join the waitlist to be first in line when we launch.
contact.hero.title: Get In Touch
contact.hero.subtitle: Have questions about SoloVetAI? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.email.title: Email Us
contact.email.description: Send us an email and we'll get back to you within 1 business day.
contact.response.title: Response Times
contact.form.title: Send Us a Message
contact.form.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you soon.
contact.form.practicePlaceholder: Small animal, equine, mixed practice, etc.
contact.form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your question or how you'd like to use SoloVetAI...
contact.form.success.title: Thanks for reaching out!
contact.form.success.message: We'll notify you when SoloVetAI launches.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.s1.p1: SoloSolutionsAI ("we," "our," or "us") operates a multi-vertical client intake automation platform serving solo practitioners and small businesses across multiple professions, including but not limited to: attorneys, therapists, social workers, veterinarians, realtors, accountants, insurance agents, and travel advisors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information when you use our platform at app.solosolutionsai.com and associated services (collectively, the "Service").
privacy.s1.p2: This policy applies to all users of the Service, including professionals who create accounts ("Professionals") and their clients who submit information through intake conversations ("Clients").
privacy.s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
privacy.s2.1.title: 2.1 Professional Account Information
privacy.s2.1.body: When a professional creates an account, we collect: full name, email address, business name, office city and state, phone number, profession/vertical, service areas or specialties, and optional business logo. Professionals may also configure: AI assistant name, client greeting, disclaimers (English and Spanish), intake questions, and scheduling preferences.
privacy.s2.2.title: 2.2 Client Intake Information
privacy.s2.2.body: Information submitted by clients through AI-powered chat conversations or phone intake includes: full name, email address, phone number (optional — clients may decline), city and state, primary concern or reason for inquiry, desired outcome, contact preference, and responses to profession-specific intake questions configured by the professional.
privacy.s2.3.title: 2.3 Conversation Transcripts
privacy.s2.3.body: Full transcripts of intake conversations (both chat and phone) are stored and made available to the professional through their admin portal. Transcripts include all messages exchanged between the client and the AI assistant during the intake session.
privacy.s2.4.title: 2.4 Uploaded Documents
privacy.s2.4.body: When a client uploads documents at the request of their professional, we collect the document files, file names, file types, and file sizes. Documents may include records, correspondence, identification, or other materials relevant to the client's matter. Providing documents is entirely voluntary.
privacy.s2.5.title: 2.5 Usage and Technical Data
privacy.s2.5.body: We collect standard technical information including: IP address, browser type, device type, pages visited, time spent, referring URLs, and similar analytics data through Google Analytics 4. This data is used to improve the Service and is not linked to individual client intake records.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Information We Refuse to Collect
privacy.s3.body: SoloSolutionsAI employs active data boundary enforcement. Our system is architecturally designed to detect and block the following categories of sensitive information in real time during intake conversations:
privacy.s3.ssn: Social Security Numbers (SSN) — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3.credit: Credit card numbers — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3.bank: Bank account and routing numbers — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3.govId: Government-issued ID numbers — detected and blocked
privacy.s3.note: If a client volunteers any of this information during an intake conversation, the system detects the pattern, redacts the data from the transcript, does not store it, and gracefully redirects the conversation. This protection operates at the infrastructure level, not the policy level — meaning the system is structurally incapable of retaining this data, regardless of user input.
privacy.s4.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
privacy.s4.f1: Provide, operate, and maintain the Service
privacy.s4.f2: Process client intake submissions and deliver them to the appropriate professional
privacy.s4.f3: Generate AI-powered intake summaries, context notes, and intelligence briefs
privacy.s4.f4: Analyze uploaded documents using AI to produce structured summaries for the professional
privacy.s4.f5: Send email notifications about new intake submissions to professionals and confirmation emails to clients
privacy.s4.f6: Generate AI-powered marketing content (blog posts, social media copy) at the professional's request
privacy.s4.f7: Sync intake data to third-party services (HubSpot, Zapier, webhooks) when configured by the professional
privacy.s4.f8: Provide consultation scheduling functionality via Calendly integration
privacy.s4.f9: Monitor platform health and performance via internal analytics
privacy.s5.title: 5. Third-Party Integrations and Data Sharing
privacy.s5.intro: SoloSolutionsAI integrates with third-party services. Data is shared with these services only when explicitly configured by the professional. We do not sell, rent, or share client data with third parties for their own marketing purposes.
privacy.s5.1.title: 5.1 HubSpot CRM
privacy.s5.1.body: When a professional connects their HubSpot account via OAuth, completed intake data (client name, email, phone, location, primary concern, desired outcome, contact preference, and AI context summary) is automatically sent to HubSpot to create or update a contact record. Data flows one way: from SoloSolutionsAI to HubSpot. The professional's HubSpot account is governed by HubSpot's own privacy policy and terms.
privacy.s5.2.title: 5.2 Webhooks (Zapier, Make, Custom Endpoints)
privacy.s5.2.body: Professionals may configure webhook URLs that receive intake data when a client completes an intake. The data payload includes: client name, email, phone, location, primary concern, desired outcome, contact preference, intake source, and vertical. Webhook payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 when a signing secret is configured. The professional is solely responsible for the security and privacy practices of their webhook endpoints and connected services.
privacy.s5.3.title: 5.3 Calendly
privacy.s5.3.body: When a professional connects Calendly, we store OAuth tokens to facilitate consultation invite emails. We do not access or store Calendly appointment data beyond the scheduling URL and event type.
privacy.s5.4.title: 5.4 AI Processing Services
privacy.s5.4.body: We use Anthropic (Claude) for AI-powered intake conversations, context summaries, intelligence briefs, document analysis, and blog post generation. Our AI provider does not retain, store, or use your data to train AI models. Data is processed in real time and discarded by the provider after the response is generated.
privacy.s5.5.title: 5.5 Email Services
privacy.s5.5.body: Transactional emails (intake notifications, client confirmations, document requests) are sent via Resend. Email content is transmitted securely and is not stored by the email provider beyond delivery.
privacy.s5.6.title: 5.6 Analytics
privacy.s5.6.body: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect anonymized usage data on our marketing websites and platform. Analytics data is not linked to individual client intake records.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Data Security
privacy.s6.intro: We implement robust technical and organizational security measures to protect your information:
privacy.s6.f1: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256 encryption
privacy.s6.f2: Database access is governed by Row Level Security (RLS) policies — professionals can only access their own data
privacy.s6.f3: Client document storage uses private, encrypted buckets with access-controlled policies
privacy.s6.f4: No employee, contractor, or representative of SoloSolutionsAI views, reads, or reviews client intake data or uploaded documents — all processing is fully automated
privacy.s6.f5: API rate limiting is enforced to prevent abuse
privacy.s6.f6: CORS policies restrict access to authorized domains only
privacy.s6.f7: Integration tokens (HubSpot, Calendly) are encrypted and stored securely
privacy.s7.title: 7. Data Retention
privacy.s7.professional: Professional accounts: Account information is retained for as long as your account is active. You may request account deletion at any time.
privacy.s7.intakeRecords: Client intake records: Intake submissions, conversation transcripts, and AI-generated summaries are retained unless the professional or client requests deletion. Professionals can manage and delete intake records from their admin portal.
privacy.s7.documents: Uploaded documents: Client-uploaded documents and their AI-generated summaries are automatically deleted from our systems 30 days after upload. SoloSolutionsAI is designed as a pass-through service, not a permanent document repository. Professionals are responsible for downloading and retaining any documents they need within this window.
privacy.s7.integration: Integration data: OAuth tokens for connected services (HubSpot, Calendly) are retained until the professional disconnects the integration. Data that has been synced to third-party services is governed by those services' retention policies.
privacy.s7.deletion: Right to deletion: Clients may request immediate deletion of their data, including intake records and uploaded documents, at any time by contacting privacy@solosolutionsai.com. Upon receiving a valid request, we will delete the relevant data from our systems. Note: data already synced to third-party services (HubSpot, webhooks) must be deleted by the professional from those services directly.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Profession-Specific Considerations
privacy.s8.intro: SoloSolutionsAI serves professionals across multiple regulated and unregulated industries. The following considerations apply:
privacy.s8.1.title: 8.1 Legal Professionals
privacy.s8.1.body: SoloSolutionsAI is a software tool only. Use of the Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. Attorneys are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable rules of professional conduct, ethics rules, and client confidentiality requirements in their jurisdiction. Data retention requirements vary by state bar — attorneys should download and retain intake records according to their jurisdictional requirements.
privacy.s8.2.title: 8.2 Mental Health Professionals
privacy.s8.2.body: The Service is designed for initial client onboarding and lead capture — not for clinical documentation, treatment planning, or session notes. The AI intake conversation does not constitute a therapeutic session. Therapists and counselors are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable licensing board requirements and patient confidentiality obligations. The Service is not intended to be HIPAA-compliant and should not be used to collect protected health information (PHI) as defined by HIPAA.
privacy.s8.3.title: 8.3 Social Workers
privacy.s8.3.body: Social workers using the Service should ensure compliance with the NASW Code of Ethics regarding client confidentiality and informed consent. The Service supports initial intake and inquiry capture — it is not a case management system.
privacy.s8.4.title: 8.4 Healthcare and Veterinary Professionals
privacy.s8.4.body: The Service captures initial client/patient owner information for onboarding purposes. It is not an electronic health records (EHR) system and should not be used to store medical records, diagnoses, or treatment plans. AI-generated intelligence briefs are informational tools and do not constitute medical or veterinary diagnosis.
privacy.s8.5.title: 8.5 Financial Professionals
privacy.s8.5.body: Accountants and insurance professionals are responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable financial privacy regulations. Our data boundary enforcement actively blocks collection of financial account numbers, Social Security Numbers, and other sensitive financial identifiers during intake.
privacy.s8.6.title: 8.6 All Professions
privacy.s8.6.body: Regardless of profession, all professionals using SoloSolutionsAI are solely responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable laws, regulations, professional standards, and ethical codes in their jurisdiction. SoloSolutionsAI provides a technology platform — it does not provide legal, medical, financial, or professional advice of any kind.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Your Rights
privacy.s9.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
privacy.s9.access: Access: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you
privacy.s9.correction: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate information
privacy.s9.deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information
privacy.s9.portability: Portability: Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.s9.objection: Objection: Object to processing of your information for certain purposes
privacy.s9.restriction: Restriction: Request that we limit how we use your information
privacy.s9.withdrawal: Withdrawal of consent: Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent
privacy.s9.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@solosolutionsai.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s10.title: 10. US State Privacy Laws
privacy.s10.intro: We comply with applicable US state privacy laws, including:
privacy.s10.california: California (CCPA/CPRA): California residents have the right to know what personal information is collected, request deletion, and opt out of the sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information.
privacy.s10.other: Virginia (VCDPA), Colorado (CPA), Connecticut (CTDPA): Residents of these states have similar rights to access, correction, deletion, and portability of their personal information.
privacy.s10.note: We do not sell, share for cross-context behavioral advertising, or use personal information for profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects.
privacy.s11.title: 11. International Users and Data Transfers
privacy.s11.intro: SoloSolutionsAI is operated by SPD Digital Consulting LLC, based in the United States. All data is currently stored and processed in the United States (AWS US-East-1 region via Supabase).
privacy.s11.1.title: 11.1 United Kingdom
privacy.s11.1.body: For users in the United Kingdom, personal data is transferred to the United States under the UK-US Data Bridge framework, which provides adequate safeguards for the transfer of personal data from the UK to certified US organizations. We process personal data based on: (a) contractual necessity — to provide the Service you have requested; (b) legitimate interests — to operate, maintain, and improve our platform; or (c) your explicit consent.
privacy.s11.1.rights: Your rights under UK GDPR include: access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection to processing, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.
privacy.s11.2.title: 11.2 European Economic Area
privacy.s11.2.body: For users in the EEA, personal data is transferred to the United States under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. You have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. The same lawful bases and data subject rights described in Section 11.1 apply.
privacy.s11.3.title: 11.3 Data Residency
privacy.s11.3.body: All data is currently stored in the United States. We are evaluating regional data residency options (including UK-based storage) for future availability. If you have specific data residency requirements, please contact us at privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
privacy.s11.consent: By using the Service, you acknowledge and consent to the transfer and processing of your information in the United States in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable data transfer frameworks.
privacy.s12.title: 12. Children's Privacy
privacy.s12.body: The Service is not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a minor, please contact us immediately at privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
privacy.s13.title: 13. Changes to This Policy
privacy.s13.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered professionals of material changes by email and by posting the updated policy on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s14.title: 14. Contact Us
privacy.s14.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, wish to exercise your rights, or have concerns about our data practices, please contact us at:
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.body: By accessing or using SoloSolutionsAI ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service. These Terms apply to all users, including professionals who create accounts ("Professionals") and individuals who submit information through intake conversations ("Clients").
terms.s2.title: 2. Description of Service
terms.s2.body: SoloSolutionsAI provides an AI-powered client intake and onboarding platform for solo practitioners and small businesses across multiple professions. The Service includes: conversational AI intake (chat and phone), AI-generated summaries and intelligence briefs, email notifications, client submission management, document upload and AI analysis, marketing content generation (blog posts, social media copy, visual cards), third-party integrations (HubSpot CRM, Zapier, webhooks, Calendly), and website widget embedding.
terms.s3.title: 3. Account Registration
terms.s3.intro: To use the Service as a Professional, you must:
terms.s3.f1: Be a licensed, certified, or qualified professional in your field (where applicable)
terms.s3.f2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.s3.f3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
terms.s3.f4: Be responsible for all activities under your account
terms.s3.f5: Promptly update your account information if it changes
terms.s3.note: You may not create an account on behalf of another person or entity without their authorization. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that contain false or misleading information.
terms.s4.title: 4. Subscription and Billing
terms.s4.1.title: 4.1 Plans and Pricing
terms.s4.1.body: The Service is offered in multiple subscription tiers (Starter, Pro, and Pro+), each with different feature access levels and usage limits. Current pricing and feature details are available on our pricing page. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days' advance notice.
terms.s4.2.title: 4.2 Free Trial
terms.s4.2.body: All plans include a 14-day free trial with full Pro+ access. You will not be charged until your trial ends. If you do not select a paid plan before the trial expires, your account will be moved to the Starter tier.
terms.s4.3.title: 4.3 Payment
terms.s4.3.body: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. By subscribing to a paid plan, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis. You are responsible for keeping your payment information current.
terms.s4.4.title: 4.4 Cancellation and Refunds
terms.s4.4.body: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, your access continues through the end of your current billing period. No prorated refunds are issued for partial billing periods. You may manage your subscription through the Stripe Customer Portal accessible from your account settings.
terms.s5.title: 5. Acceptable Use
terms.s5.f1: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations
terms.s5.f2: Submit, collect, or store information that you are not authorized to collect
terms.s5.f3: Attempt to circumvent data boundary enforcement mechanisms (e.g., intentionally collecting prohibited data types such as Social Security Numbers, credit card numbers, or government IDs through modified intake questions)
terms.s5.f4: Use the Service to send spam, unsolicited communications, or harass individuals
terms.s5.f5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, other accounts, or related systems
terms.s5.f6: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service
terms.s5.f7: Resell, redistribute, or sublicense the Service without our written consent
terms.s5.f8: Use the Service in a manner that could damage, disable, or impair our infrastructure
terms.s5.f9: Use AI-generated content (blog posts, marketing copy) in a misleading or deceptive manner
terms.s5.f10: Misrepresent AI-generated summaries or intelligence briefs as your own professional analysis
terms.s6.title: 6. AI Disclosure and Limitations
terms.s6.1.title: 6.1 Nature of AI Services
terms.s6.1.body: SoloSolutionsAI uses artificial intelligence (powered by Anthropic Claude) to conduct intake conversations, generate summaries, produce intelligence briefs, analyze documents, and create marketing content. AI-generated content is produced algorithmically and may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies.
terms.s6.2.title: 6.2 Not Professional Advice
terms.s6.2.body: IMPORTANT: AI-generated summaries, intelligence briefs, context notes, document analyses, and any other AI output provided through the Service do not constitute legal advice, medical advice, financial advice, therapeutic guidance, or professional counsel of any kind. All AI output is informational only and is intended to assist — not replace — the professional's own judgment, analysis, and expertise.
terms.s6.3.title: 6.3 Professional Responsibility
terms.s6.3.body: Professionals are solely responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before acting on it, making their own professional assessments, and ensuring their use of the Service complies with all applicable professional standards, licensing requirements, and ethical codes.
terms.s6.4.title: 6.4 AI-Generated Marketing Content
terms.s6.4.body: Blog posts and marketing content generated through the Service are created by AI based on your profession, specialties, and location. You are responsible for reviewing all generated content for accuracy, appropriateness, and compliance with advertising regulations applicable to your profession before publishing.
terms.s7.title: 7. Professional Relationship Disclaimer
terms.s7.intro: IMPORTANT: SoloSolutionsAI is a software tool only. Use of this Service does not create a professional-client relationship of any kind between SoloSolutionsAI and either the Professional or the Client. Specifically:
terms.s7.attorneys: For attorneys: Use of the Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. Establishing such a relationship is the sole responsibility of the attorney in accordance with their jurisdiction's rules of professional conduct.
terms.s7.therapists: For therapists and counselors: The AI intake conversation does not constitute a therapeutic session, clinical assessment, or treatment. Establishing a therapeutic relationship is the sole responsibility of the licensed professional.
terms.s7.socialWorkers: For social workers: The intake process does not constitute a social work assessment, intervention, or case management activity.
terms.s7.healthcare: For healthcare and veterinary professionals: AI-generated intelligence briefs do not constitute medical or veterinary diagnoses, and should not be treated as clinical recommendations.
terms.s7.financial: For financial professionals: The Service does not provide financial, tax, or insurance advice. All professional determinations are the responsibility of the licensed professional.
terms.s7.allProfessions: For all professions: Clients submitting intake information are prospective clients of the Professional, not clients of SoloSolutionsAI. The Professional is solely responsible for the professional relationship.
terms.s8.title: 8. Third-Party Integrations
terms.s8.intro: The Service allows Professionals to connect third-party services including HubSpot, Zapier, Make, custom webhook endpoints, and Calendly. By connecting a third-party integration:
terms.s8.f1: You authorize SoloSolutionsAI to transmit intake data to the connected service as configured
terms.s8.f2: You are solely responsible for the privacy, security, and compliance of data once it reaches the third-party service
terms.s8.f3: You acknowledge that third-party services are governed by their own terms of service and privacy policies
terms.s8.f4: You are responsible for informing your clients that their data may be shared with third-party services and obtaining any required consent
terms.s8.f5: SoloSolutionsAI is not liable for data breaches, misuse, or policy violations by third-party services
terms.s9.title: 9. Document Uploads
terms.s9.intro: The Service allows Professionals to request documents from Clients, which Clients may upload voluntarily. By using this feature:
terms.s9.aiAnalysis: AI Analysis: Uploaded documents are processed by AI to generate structured summaries for the requesting Professional. These summaries are informational only and do not constitute professional analysis or advice.
terms.s9.noHumanReview: No Human Review: No employee, contractor, or representative of SoloSolutionsAI views, reads, or reviews uploaded documents. All processing is fully automated.
terms.s9.retention: Limited Retention: Uploaded documents and AI summaries are automatically deleted 30 days after upload. SoloSolutionsAI is not a document storage service.
terms.s9.accessControl: Access Control: Documents are accessible only to the Professional who requested them. Documents are encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256).
terms.s9.deletionRights: Deletion Rights: Clients may request immediate deletion of uploaded documents at any time by contacting privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
terms.s9.responsibility: Professional Responsibility: Professionals are responsible for ensuring that requesting, receiving, and storing client documents complies with all applicable professional conduct rules, confidentiality obligations, and data protection laws in their jurisdiction.
terms.s10.title: 10. Data Ownership
terms.s10.p1: You retain ownership of all data you input into the Service. By using the Service, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to process your data solely to provide, maintain, and improve the Service. We do not claim ownership of your intake data, documents, or generated content.
terms.s10.p2: AI-generated content (summaries, intelligence briefs, blog posts, marketing copy) created through the Service is provided to you for your use. You may use, modify, and publish this content as you see fit, subject to your professional and legal obligations.
terms.s11.title: 11. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.s11.body: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR FREE OF HARMFUL COMPONENTS. WE DO NOT WARRANT THE ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, OR RELIABILITY OF ANY AI-GENERATED CONTENT. WE DO NOT PROVIDE LEGAL, MEDICAL, FINANCIAL, OR PROFESSIONAL ADVICE OF ANY KIND.
terms.s12.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
terms.s12.p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, SOLOSOLUTIONSAI AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO: LOSS OF REVENUE, LOSS OF DATA, LOSS OF CLIENTS, PROFESSIONAL LIABILITY CLAIMS, OR REGULATORY ACTIONS ARISING FROM USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms.s12.p2: OUR TOTAL LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIMS ARISING UNDER THESE TERMS SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID FOR THE SERVICE IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
terms.s13.title: 13. Indemnification
terms.s13.body: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless SoloSolutionsAI from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, or expenses (including reasonable attorney's fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Service; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of any applicable law or regulation; (d) your violation of any professional or ethical obligation; or (e) any claim by a third party (including your clients) related to your use of the Service or data shared through integrations you have configured.
terms.s14.title: 14. Termination
terms.s14.p1: You may cancel your subscription and close your account at any time. Upon cancellation, your access continues through the end of your current billing period.
terms.s14.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or any reason with reasonable notice. In the event of termination, we will provide you with a reasonable opportunity to export your data.
terms.s14.p3: Upon account deletion, we will delete your account information, intake records, and associated data from our systems, subject to any legal retention requirements and our data retention policy.
terms.s15.title: 15. Changes to Terms
terms.s15.body: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify registered Professionals of material changes by email at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree with the revised Terms, you must stop using the Service and close your account.
terms.s16.title: 16. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
terms.s16.p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
terms.s16.p2: Any dispute arising under these Terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association, conducted in the State of Florida. You agree to waive any right to a jury trial or to participate in a class action.
terms.s17.title: 17. Miscellaneous
terms.s17.entireAgreement: Entire Agreement: These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and SoloSolutionsAI.
terms.s17.severability: Severability: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms.s17.waiver: Waiver: Failure to enforce any provision of these Terms does not constitute a waiver of that provision.
terms.s17.assignment: Assignment: You may not assign or transfer your rights under these Terms without our written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without restriction.
terms.s18.title: 18. Contact
terms.s18.body: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at:
